stories.title: Barnwell's NFL trade value guide: The 155 players worth at least one first-round draft pick
stories.summary: Which NFL players would be worth one first-rounder in a trade? Two? Seven?! Let's put each team's stars into value tiers, factoring in ability, positions, contracts and age.

stories.title: Clark: Missed call means playing with leg contusio...
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark was frustrated by a non-call midway through the second quarter Wednesday night and sounded off after the Fever's 88-75 loss to the Valkyries.

stories.title: Messi: Win over England meant most to our fans
stories.summary: Lionel Messi set up two goals in the dying minutes of Argentina's semifinal against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium on Wednesday to snatch a 2-1 win and a spot in the final Sunday against Spain.

stories.title: 2 suspects in UFC WH terror plot plead not guilty
stories.summary: Two of the eight men indicted for their alleged roles in a thwarted drone and sniper attack on last month's UFC Freedom 250 event held at the White House have pleaded not guilty.

stories.title: Reports: Brewers finalizing trade for McCullers
stories.summary: The Astros have traded right-hander Lance McCullers Jr., their longest-tenured pitcher, and lefty Colton Gordon to the Brewers for minor league outfielder Jadyn Fielder.
